useCases: Code editor with sidebar and preview panes
Email client with list and detail panels

requiredProps.name: direction
requiredProps.description: Axis along which panels are split

commonPatterns.name: horizontal-split
commonPatterns.description: Two panels split horizontally with a drag handle

commonPatterns.name: three-column
commonPatterns.description: Three-pane layout with two drag handles

commonPatterns.name: nested-split
commonPatterns.description: Vertical split nested inside a horizontal split

antiPatterns.scenario: Using resizable panels for simple stacked layouts
antiPatterns.reason: Adds drag-resize complexity when static CSS flex/grid suffices
antiPatterns.alternative: Use standard CSS flex or grid for non-resizable layouts

antiPatterns.scenario: Panels without defaultSize that don't add up to 100
antiPatterns.reason: Panel sizes must total 100 for the group to render correctly
antiPatterns.alternative: Ensure all panel defaultSize values sum to 100

parentConstraints: Must have a defined height (h-full or explicit) on the parent

interactions.drag: ResizableHandle can be dragged to resize adjacent panels
interactions.keyboard: Arrow keys resize panels when handle is focused

responsive.mobile: Consider collapsing to stacked layout or hiding panels

accessibility.role: separator (on the handle, provided by react-resizable-panels)
accessibility.keyboardSupport: Arrow keys to resize; Tab to focus handles
accessibility.screenReader: Handle announced as a separator with resize semantics
accessibility.focusManagement: Focus outline on handle via focus-visible (outline instead of ring to avoid clipping by parent overflow:hidden)

rules: Panel defaultSize values must sum to 100 within a group
The parent container must have a defined height
Use withHandle on ResizableHandle to show a visible grip icon
direction prop on ResizablePanelGroup controls horizontal vs vertical split (mapped to orientation internally for react-resizable-panels v4)

aiHints.context: Use for resizable split-pane layouts. Built on react-resizable-panels. ResizablePanelGroup wraps ResizablePanel and ResizableHandle components. Panel sizes are percentages that must total 100. withHandle adds a visible grip icon on the drag handle.
